title: chaetocalyx brasiliensis
intro: Chaetocalyx brasiliensis, also known as the Brazilian horse-ear, is a medicinal plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Chaetocalyx brasiliensis include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Chaetocalyx brasiliensis typically involve making a tea from the leaves or roots, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
